title: nautilocalyx hirsutus
intro: Nautilocalyx hirsutus, also known as the hairy nautilocalyx, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Nautilocalyx hirsutus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
